info.name: Sono shop with branch
info.description:
Sono shop -r nehemjleh uusgeh, nehemjlehiin tolov shalgah, salbar uusgeh, salbar zasvarlah bolomjtoi

url - [https://rico.mn](https://rico.mn)

x-and-auth-user, x-and-auth-token -iig sono shop ajiltan-s huleen avna

body.raw:
{
    "amount": 20000, //*nehemjlehiin dun. min=10000
    "description": "test nehemjleh", //*nemehjlehiin tailbar
    "callback_url": "1",  //*төлбөр амжиллтай төлөгдөхөд дуудах callback url
    "invoice_id": "20260116135333000001" , //* davtagdahgui dugaarlalttai bn | max - 50 temdegt
    "phoneNumber": "86104449", //sono burtgeltei dugaar | zaaval bish
    "duration": "", //nehemjlehiin hugatsaa second-r | zaaval bish
    "trackingData":"" // //salbartai bol ene talbart branch_code talbariin utgiig boglono | zaaval bish
}

request.description: shine invoice uusgeh huselt, invoice_id davhardahgui bn, 50 temdegt hurtelh urttai bn

response.name: Invoices

body.raw:
{
    "amount": 41000, //*nehemjlehiin dun. min=50000
    "description": "Shine nehemjleh", //*nemehjlehiin tailbar
    "callback_url": "https://api.cody.mn/process/sono",  //*butsaj duudah url
    "invoice_id": "2026010909051150222223" , //* davtagdahgui dugaarlalttai bn 
    "phoneNumber": "", //sono burtgeltei dugaar | zaaval bish
    "duration": "", //nehemjlehiin hugatsaa second-r | zaaval bish
    "trackingData":"5050505051;1234567" //nemelteer tracking data | zaaval bish
}

    "branch_id": 105, //*Засах салбарын дугаар
    "status": 1, //*Салбарын төлөв (1-идэвхтэй, 0-идэвхгүй)

}
